theme.zh: 可再生能源基础设施遥感识别
theme.en: Remote sensing identification of renewable energy infrastructure

summary.zh: 利用遥感与人工智能技术识别可再生能源基础设施，如光伏电站。
summary.en: Utilize remote sensing and artificial intelligence technologies to identify renewable energy infrastructure, such as photovoltaic power plants.

summary.zh: 评估可再生资源的潜力及不确定性
summary.en: Assessing the potential and uncertainties of renewable resources

theme.zh: 可再生能源部署的生态环境影响
theme.en: Ecological and environmental impacts of renewable energy deployment

summary.zh: 基于遥感、人工智能、大数据分析可再生能源部署的生态环境影响
summary.en: Ecological and environmental impacts of renewable energy deployment based on remote sensing, artificial intelligence, and big data analysis
